name: Honey-Glazed Red Pepper with Goat Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 whole sweet red pepper, cored & seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the red pepper.
2. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the sliced onion and garlic; sauté until tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Add honey, vinegar, basil, salt, and pepper to the pan. Cook and stir until the mixture is glazed.
4. Serve on lettuce-lined plates with goat cheese and toasted baguettes.
